purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Fish It stats are now in the app: a new Fish It tab with Daily, Stats, and Fish cards — all linked to your Discord identity (the same pairing session already authenticates you, no extra login). Stats are read live from the Fish It bot database; nothing is faked.

Daily tab: filter by Today / Yesterday / 7 Days / 30 Days / All Time with total, secret, forgotten counts, best catch, and a per-species breakdown. Shows a clean empty state when there are no catches for a period.

Stats tab: total fish caught + rank, rarity cards (Secret / Forgotten with real caught-fish images) and rod cards (Ghostfinn / Element / Diamond). Rod images aren't stored by the bot, so those cards use a themed fallback icon rather than inventing one.

Fish tab: responsive fish card grid using real fish images from the database (Coil, lazy-loaded with a fallback box on missing/error), with server-side search, rarity filter, sort (most caught / value / name / rarity / recent), and Load more pagination.

Light / Dark theme: new Appearance settings with System / Light / Dark, persisted locally and following the system theme by default. The whole app recolors instantly (dashboard, snapshot, packages, settings, Fish It).

Hide Username privacy toggle in Settings: masks your Discord name everywhere in the UI (e.g. dengjiangbin -> d**********n). It's display-only and never changes your account, identity, or stats matching.
API errors across Fish It show a clear reason + Retry instead of an endless spinner. All private stats are fetched with your authenticated session — a client can never request another user's stats.
